prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 10657→10408→12614→11500→6667，2025 年（新高考首年）位次大幅前移至约 6667 名，较 2024 年跃升约 4833 名，主要受考试模式切换影响；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 55 人→2022 年 56 人→2023 年 57 人→2024 年 56 人→2025 年 52 人；2026 年计划 59 人，较 2025 年扩招约 13.5%，扩招将稀释竞争、推后录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 65 名持续上升至 2026 年第 52 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强；2023 年声誉评价偏负面（学校管理事件），但影响已随时间淡化；抖音热度排名第 71 位（评价「一般」），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；无显著投档断档记录；食品科学与工程 A+、轻工技术与工程 A+，两个 A+ 王牌学科，在全国具有顶尖竞争力，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热；食品科学与工程所 属的生化环材大类社会热度偏低（明显劝退），但江南大学食品学科为 A+ 王牌，可部分抵消大类负面舆情；本省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 154000 人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类合计约 116360 人）大幅增长约 32%，物理类考生按比例估算约 11 万人，竞争显著加剧；江南大学位于江苏无锡，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在内蒙古招生占比约 1.3%–1.8%，属外省普通规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考首年位次异常前移的基数效应、2026 年计划扩招约 13.5% 的稀释作用、以及本省考生总数大幅增长约 32% 带来的竞争加剧，预计 2026 年理科/物理类最低位次将在 2025 年基准 6667 名基础上后移；预测最低位次约 7405 名，区间 6905–7905 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 10657→10408→12614→11500→6667. In 2025 (the first year of the new college entrance examination), the ranking significantly advanced to about 6667, a jump of approximately 4833 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the change in exam mode. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 55 in 2021→56 in 2022→57 in 2023→56 in 2024→52 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 59, an increase of about 13.5% compared to 2025, which will dilute competition and push back the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to school management incidents), but the impact has faded over time. Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application attention. There are no significant records of admission gaps. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are two A+ flagship disciplines with top competitiveness nationwide, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after. The broader category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, which includes Food Science and Engineering, has low social popularity (clearly discouraging), but Jiangnan University's Food Science discipline is an A+ flagship, partially offsetting the negative perception of the category. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories totaling approximately 116,360). Physics category candidates are estimated at about 110,000, leading to intensified competition. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.8%, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the abnormal forward shift in ranking in 2025 (the first year of the new exam), the dilution effect of the planned enrollment expansion of about 13.5% in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science/physics category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 6667. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7405, with a range of 6905–7905.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6905–7905, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Food Science and Engineering A+ flagship, Internet of Things Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Artificial Intelligence) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Textile, Light Chemical, Packaging, Brewing) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<6905), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2897→2539→2073→2234→1966, showing a fluctuating forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 931 places over the past 5 years; the baseline for 2025 (first year of new college entrance exam) is approximately 1966; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021→6 in 2022→6 in 2023→6 in 2024→10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with recent years showing a stable improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (school management incident), but the impact has faded over time; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application interest; no significant record of admission gaps; Food Science and Engineering A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, two A+ flagship disciplines, though primarily science and engineering, the 211 level still holds overall appeal for liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (one of the liberal arts admission majors) is socially recommended, Chinese Language and Literature (newly added in 2025) is socially recommended, and the overall application willingness for liberal arts majors is stable; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with history category students estimated at about 44,000, leading to notably intensified competition; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local preference; its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.8%, which is a normal scale for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the 20% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, and the significant 32% increase in the total number of provincial examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 1966; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1700, with a range of 1394–2006.
